facility_acronym: # Manual overrides for cases where scripts/seed_people_from_openalex.py
# cannot resolve a facility to its OpenAlex institution ID automatically.
#   - Homepage is a subdomain of a larger host (sbclter.msi.ucsb.edu)
#   - Facility name is too generic ("Hawaiian Islands Sentinel Site")
#   - Parent university has multiple labs under one institution record
#   - OpenAlex simply hasn't crawled that small program
# Either key works as the lookup — facility_acronym (when unique) OR
# openalex_institution_id is the short form starting with "I"
# Rows beginning with '#' are comments and skipped by the loader.
# Confirmed mappings from earlier seed runs. Copy lines below
# LTER sites — most are hosted at a university or marine-lab parent.
# Facility-id values are the sha1-based IDs from `facilities.facility_id`;

notes: CCE LTER -> Scripps Institution of Oceanography
GCE LTER -> University of Georgia (verify ID)
VCR LTER -> University of Virginia (verify ID)
NGA LTER -> University of Alaska Fairbanks (verify ID)
BLE LTER -> University of Texas at Austin (verify ID)
FCE LTER -> Florida International University (verify ID)
NTL LTER -> University of Wisconsin-Madison (verify ID)
NES LTER -> Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution / WHOI
